segments.text: [Music] this is not so I'm going to go just under the skin pointing away from the eye to make all my YouTube followers happy yeah happy birthday it's needless kind of blunt I'm doing only one unit there because I don't I just want to soften The Superficial fibers or not I usually do that for here so I'm angled middle depth four units here a more superficial third of the way in do cheers halfway that was interesting I felt it squirt against my thumb

that's the easiest and safest one well that was in the damage yeah harder to inject it's the easiest place to inject you've done it already so forehead you've only got one muscle to worry about some people say you get a better effect when you go down and touch the bone I like to just try and aim for the muscle which means through the fat that's skin hypodermis and then into the muscle you can kind of just touch the bone
it's okay so that's two units if you do too on your side effect nice and stable so one unit here foreign [Music]

transcript: [Music] this is not so I'm going to go just under the skin pointing away from the eye to make all my YouTube followers happy yeah happy birthday it's needless kind of blunt I'm doing only one unit there because I don't I just want to soften The Superficial fibers or not I usually do that for here so I'm angled middle depth four units here a more superficial third of the way in do cheers halfway that was interesting I felt it squirt against my thumb that's the easiest and safest one well that was in the damage yeah harder to inject it's the easiest place to inject you've done it already so forehead you've only got one muscle to worry about some people say you get a better effect when you go down and touch the bone I like to just try and aim for the muscle which means through the fat that's skin hypodermis and then into the muscle you can kind of just touch the bone it's okay so that's two units if you do too on your side effect nice and stable so one unit here foreign [Music]
